params.AddKeyword: Flying & First Strike & Double Strike & Deathtouch & Haste & Hexproof & Indestructible & Lifelink & Menace & Reach & Vigilance
params.Description: If you removed a creature card with flying from the draft with cards named Animus of Predation, CARDNAME has flying. The same is true for first strike, double strike, deathtouch, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, and vigilance.
